name: Mekeo–Kuni LLG
description: Covering the fertile inland plains, the Mekeo–Kuni LLG serves a largely agricultural population and hosts several of the district's oldest primary schools.
focus: Improving early-grade literacy and expanding access to elementary schooling across rural wards.

name: Unino Bundi Coastal LLG
description: Spanning the coastal communities and islands, this LLG coordinates education services for fishing and mission-station villages with a strong Catholic education heritage.
focus: Supporting mission-agency schools and improving teacher housing on the islands.

name: Waima–Roro LLG
description: The Waima–Roro LLG represents the western coastal wards, balancing subsistence livelihoods with a growing demand for secondary school places.
focus: Building additional classrooms and strengthening the transition from primary to secondary education.
